titleStmt.title: SII 26.686: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 686. (A.R. No. 641 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the king as ‘who destroyed the ships at Śālai’.

It records a gift of land specified in detail by a certain Aṟinjigai Niṉṟāṉ of Vaḍagarai-maṅgalam in Veṇṇāḍu for worship and offerings in the temple of the god Tirumūlattāṉamuḍaiya-mahādēvar of the same place. It is stated that the worship was offered 4 times daily and provision for food-offerings, 4 nandā lamps, and one sandhi lamp for bathing image of the deity in ghee, milk, and curds on Saṅkrānti days, for clothes and for the kalaśa-pūja ceremony was made by the same donor.

It also records a gift of land to the uvachchars of the temple for sounding one talaippaṟai, three maddaḷi, one karaḍigai, one sēgaṇḍi and one pair (aṇai) of hand-bell (kaimaṇi). It records yet another gift by the same donor of land to those who performed the services of alagiḍudal and meḻukkiḍudal in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . cālai kalamaṟutta korājarājakesariparmmakku yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu
veṇṇāṭṭu vaṭakaraimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Aṟiñcikainiṉṟāṉeṉ Ivvūr tirumulaṭṭāṉamuṭaiya mahādevar
kku nila nivantañ ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr vaṭavūr nila mukkāle Iraṇṭu māvukkum Ellai kiḻpāṟkel
lai piṭārikoyil kuḷattukkup pokum vaḻikku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkkellai Ūrk kuḷattukkum Ūr nantavāṉattu
kku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai Ūr nilamāṉa kāṟceykkum kurāṉ ceykku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūr nilamāṉa nā
māvukkum piṭārikoyil kuḷaṅkaḷākku teṟkkum Āka Innaṭuvupaṭṭa nilam mukkāle Iraṇṭu māvum kiḻur Iraṇṭu māvukkum
ellai kiḻpāṟkellai Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ūr nilamāṉa kāṟceykku vaṭakkum melpāṟ
kellai kāṟceykkum Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Innaṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu
māvum teṉṉūr muṉṟu māvukkum Ellai kiḻpāṟkellai Ayyaṉkoyiliṉ kiḻai niṟai tāḻiyāṉa kāṟceykku meṟkku
teṉpāṟkellai vāykkālukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ayyaṉ kot
taṉ melai nāṉ māvukku teṟkum Innaṭuvupaṭṭa nilam mūṉṟu māvum Āka Innilaṅkoṇṭu Ivvūr śrīkoyiluṭaiyarkku
ceyyakkaṭava nivantam Uṭaiyārkkut tiruvamutu potu nāṉāḻi Āka nālusantik kum Arici patakkum ney Amutu po
tu Oru piṭiyāka nālusan=tikkum ney Uḻakkum kaṟiyamutu Oṉṟum tayiramutu Uriyāka nālu santikkum tayir Irunāḻiyum Aṭai
kkāyamutum veṟṟilai Amutu Uḷpaṭa potu nālu pākkāka nālu sandhikkum pākku patiṉāṟum tirunontā viḷakku nālum
sandhiviḷakku Oṉṟum Uttarāya(ya)ṉam maṟṟum sandrakrān=tīkku Uṭaiyārkku snapanamāṭi Aruḷaveṇṭum ney nāṉāḻiyum
tayir nāṉāḻiyum pāl nāṉāḻiyum kaṭuku nāṉāḻiyum Eḷḷu nāḻiyum mañcaṭppoṭi nāṉāḻiyum pori nāṉāḻiyum tara
ppaṇam nāṉāḻiyum puṭavai Iraṇṭukku Akkam Oṉṟaraiyum snapana Iru ttukku kālakkamum kalacañ cūḻ nūlukkuk kālakkamum
kalacattiṉ kiḻ Aṭṭanellu Irutūṇiyum sthāpakattukku Arici nāḻi Uriyum peruntiruvamurtukku Arici mukkuṟuṇiyum kaṟi
yamutum neyyamutum tayiramutum Ipparicu vaḻuvāmey nālu sandrakrān=tīyum grahaṇamum Ipparicu nivantañ ceyyak
kaṭavārkaḷākavum śrīkoyilukkup paṇiceyyum māṇāṇṭum Āka Innilaṅkoṇṭu Ivvaṇṇam śrīkoyiluṭaiyā
rkaḷḷe ceyyakkaṭavārkaḷākavum Idevarkey paṇiceyum Uvaccakaḷukkuc ceyta nilam kiḻur nāṉmāvukkukellai kiḻpāṟke
llai Eḻumāvukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ūrvāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Uṭcciṟuvāykkālukku ki
ḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūrnilamāṉa muṉṟumāvukku teṟkkum vāykkāliṉ teṉ karai Aṟumāvukkellai kiḻpāṟkel
lai paṟaittuṭavaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai peruvāykkālukku vaṭakkum mel pāṟkellai naravicākaṉ nilattukkuk ki
ḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūrvāykkālukku teṟkum teṉṉūr Araimāvukkum Ellai kiḻpāṟkellai Ūrnilamāṉa
muṉṟumāvukku merkkum teṉpāṟkellai Ūrnilamāṉa Orumāvukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai paṟaiccerikku
ḷattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūrnilamāṉa Araimāvukku teṟkkum Āka Innilaṅkoṇṭu Uvaccakaḷ
koṭṭakkaṭavaṉa talaippaṟai Oṉṟum mattaḷi muṉṟum kaṟaṭikai Oṉṟum cekaṇṭiyai Oṉṟum kaiymaṇi
Oraṇaiyum Ivvaṇṇam Āḷeḻuṅ koṭṭuvatākavum Idevarkke tiruvalakiṭṭut tirumeḻukkiṭuvārkku vait
ta nilam kiḻur Orumāvukku Ellai Ūrvāykkālukku merkkum teṉpāṟkellai Ūr nilam muṉṟumāvukku va
ṭakkum melpāṟkellai Oṉpatumāvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Eḻumākkāṇikku teṟkkum Āka Innila
ṅkaḷkoṇṭu tirumulaṭṭāṉamuṭaiya mahādevarkku Innivantappaṭi ceyvatākac ceytu kuṭutteṉ vaṭa
kaṇmaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Aṟiñcikainiṉṟāṉeṉ Idharmmarakṣippār śrīpādaṅkaḷ Eṉ talaimelaṉa
Idharmmam panmāheśvararakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.686 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
